The current visit record primarily details diagnoses related to severe cardiac conditions (Rheumatic heart failure, Mitral valve insufficiency, aortic valve stenosis, etc.), infections (Urinary tract infection), and general systemic issues (Anemia, Diabetes). Therefore, based strictly on the evidence required, a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" is not explicitly supported for the next visit.
